# MELBET العراق

Canonical host: https://www.melbet-iraq.net/
Primary language: ar
Site summary: Arabic-language landing for Iraq visitors with a homepage covering sports, casino, and offers, a FAQ page for players and partners, and a partnership page describing routes, tools, onboarding, and contact options.

Public pages:
- Home: https://www.melbet-iraq.net/
- FAQ: https://www.melbet-iraq.net/faq
- Partnership: https://www.melbet-iraq.net/partnership
